page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance designed for workloads requiring parallel computing capabilities. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor with an x86_64 architecture, this instance features 48 dedicated physical cores operating at a base frequency of 2.5 GHz. It is equipped with 368.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 7.67 GB of RAM per core. The primary hardware highlight is the inclusion of four NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs, delivering a combined 128 GB of high-bandwidth VRAM. No local storage is bundled with this instance, meaning storage must be attached externally. Network performance is anchored by a 16 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

In benchmark evaluations, the instance demonstrates moderate multi-core processing and memory throughput. The stress-ng multi-core CPU performance and bzip3 multi-threaded decompression both rank in the average tier, reflecting the high core count's ability to handle parallelized tasks. However, single-core performance is relatively weak, as shown by the stress-ng single-core CPU and single-threaded gzip compression benchmarks, which fall into the bottom 25% and 10% categories respectively. Memory bandwidth remains stable, with read-only large block transfers reaching 98.85 GB/sec and write operations at 47.39 GB/sec. Redis SET operations perform at an average rate of 33.18 million operations per second.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, this instance represents a specialized hardware profile where the value is concentrated in the quad-GPU configuration and high system memory density rather than raw single-core CPU speed. The tradeoff involves lower single-threaded efficiency in exchange for massive parallel processing power. This configuration is best suited for GPU-accelerated workloads such as deep learning training, parallel scientific computing, high-performance database operations, and multi-threaded data processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance featuring 48 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor at 2.5 GHz. It is equipped with 368.0 GB of system memory and four NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs, providing a total of 128 GB of VRAM. The instance does not include local storage and operates on a 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data indicates average multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance, contrasted by weaker single-core processing speeds. This hardware profile offers a qualitative balance of high memory density and parallel GPU compute power, making it suitable for deep learning, parallel scientific simulations, and multi-threaded data processing workloads.

tagline: A quad-GPU accelerated server with dedicated Intel Xeon processors and high-capacity memory for parallel computing and deep learning workloads.

48 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores operating at 2.5 GHz
368.0 GB of system memory with 7.67 GB per core
16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Optimized for parallel processing, deep learning, and scientific computing
